rows.Event Description: Wellness on the Lawn! April 25, 9AM–12PM | FREE Fitness classes, cold plunge, sauna, mimosas, IV bar & giveaways. Free + family-friendly Join us at Desert Ridge Marketplace for the Wellness on the Green Wellness Event on the AMC Lawn from 9AM-12PM for a morning of wellness, movement, and relaxation. Experience multiple FREE fitness classes, including classes from Reformed Pilates, PVOLVE( Jennifer Anisten's fitness company), refresh in our cold plunge and sauna, sip mimosas at our mobile Sip & Stroll bar, and boost your energy at the on-site IV station. Plus, enjoy giveaways, wellness-inspired surprises, and more as you recharge. This free, family-friendly event is the perfect way to glow, flow, and feel your best – don’t miss it!

rows.Event Name: An Evening with Joe Avati
rows.Event Description: Joe Avati finally brings his award winning show about growing up Italian to Phoenix Arizona. This is a show for all ages Nonna and the kids International Comedy Superstar Joe Avati will make you laugh uncontrollably as he takes you on a trip down memory lane remembering, for better or worse, the good old days. Growing up the son of Italian immigrants in the 70’s and 80’s in Australia and now being a modern day Italian Dad himself has given rise to an endless supply of material comparing life now versus back then. This show is G rated and one that the whole family can enjoy.

rows.Event Name: Camp360 by Fit Organics
rows.Event Description: Join us at Camp360 by Fit Organics for a full immersion into health and wellness, starting on September 21st 2024! Camp 360 is a weekly Saturday workshop established to build rapport with attendees from various lifestyles to enhance their community involvement. The Saturday workshop will cater to the residents of Maricopa County in hopes to bring solidarity, health awareness and bridge the gap between age and social groups. Participants will be instructed on how to properly enhance physical, mental, emotional and nutritional health. The camp is designed to promote detailed health paths that will include healthy meals, physical activity and critical thinking work to establish optimal wellness. Duration of Workshop 7:30 AM (Registration) 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM · (Session 1) 8:00 AM - 10:00 AM (Ages 35+) · (Session 2) 10:30 AM – 12:30 PM (Ages 8-17) · (Session 3) 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM (Ages 18-34) Agenda All workshop sessions are 2 hours each and will consist of: · 1 hour of a classroom/conference course (Topic with instruction & attendee discussions) · 1 hour of Physical Activity (Health & Wellness Fitness) **Session 1 will be served Breakfast prior to start **Session 2 will be served Lunch TO-GO after session **Session 3 will be served Dinner TO-GO after session ***PLEASE DRESS FOR MOVEMENT WITH CLOSED TOE SHOES****

rows.Event Name: Agile and Scrum Certification Training in Phoenix, AZ
rows.Event Description: Master the best of Agile methodologies & its foundations and learn the various Agile variants, including Scrum, Kanban, XP, and their tools. Get introduced to the incredible concepts of Agile and Scrum with this beginner’s skills development course. Learn about the various Agile variants, including Scrum, Kanban, XP, and their tools. Master Agile Project Management (APM) and the 5-stage process for Agile software development before diving deep into Scrum. Agile and Scrum are two versatile methodologies that have proven highly effective in transforming businesses, catalyzing innovation, and accelerating profitable growth. Scrum is the most dominant Agile framework, with a 58 percent adoption rate across organizations globally. Understand how Agile is used in project development, including Agile estimation, planning, monitoring, tracking, and Agile metrics and tools. Gain an understanding of SAFe®, Disciplined Agile Delivery (DAD), and Large-Scale Scrum (LeSS) frameworks and get ready to take advantage of career-defining certification opportunities from global accreditation bodies like Scrum Alliance®, Scaled Agile Inc., and Scrum.org. Leading organizations globally have adopted this powerful framework to improve time-to-market, boost quality, raise employee morale, and become truly adaptive. Agile and Scrum roles are in high demand across industries. Build your Agile and Scrum skills and future-proof your job and business. There are no eligibility requirements to attend the Agile and Scrum training. Everyone is welcome in the world of Agile and Scrum. An Enterprise Learning Solutions (ELS) provider, Learning Zone Inc. creates industry-fit talents through training, coaching, and consulting by globally-acclaimed trainers. Much of Learning Zone’s repute in co-creating business value stems from: Name: Debbie Riel Email: debbie.riel@learninzone.com Phone: +1 302.251.9769

rows.Event Name: Project Management Techniques Training Course in Avondale, AZ
rows.Event Description: Get certified in project management techniques at our classroom training and live virtual training! Project Management Techniques training, an Interactive workshop that is introduction to an updated and modern techniques about an implementation to become a great project manager Internationally acclaimed trainers compared to local trainers in physical classrooms. 8 hours intensive training on Project Management techniques Course completion certificate Our trainers are highly qualified, have 10+ years of real-world experience and will provide you with an engaging learning experience Real-World Simulations and Case Studies prepared by the industry expert 24/7 customer support Determine goals, objectives, and requirements of a project Understand planning: what it does and does not do Create a precedence network diagram to determine early and late schedules Analyze the critical path and explore duration compression options How to use Gantt and Milestone charts Implement and maintain performance measurement baselines Establish guidelines for successful closeout Apply general management skills to projects Understanding the basics of project management. Differentiating between projects and operational work. Overview of the project management lifecycle. Defining project objectives, scope, and stakeholders. Conducting feasibility studies and risk assessments. Developing a project charter and obtaining approval. Creating a project plan that includes tasks, timelines, and resources. Defining project requirements and deliverables. Developing a work breakdown structure (WBS). Estimating project costs and budgeting. Identifying and managing project risks. Creating a communication plan. Directing and managing project work. Monitoring project progress and performance. Managing changes and scope creep. Ensuring resource allocation and task coordination. Quality assurance and control. Tracking project metrics and key performance indicators (KPIs). Identifying and addressing project issues and risks. Adjusting project plans as needed. Managing stakeholder expectations. Conducting project reviews and lessons learned. Obtaining final acceptance from stakeholders. Archiving project documentation. Celebrating project success and recognizing team contributions. Introduction to popular project management software (e.g., Microsoft Project, Jira, Trello). Using tools for scheduling, resource management, and reporting. Effective communication and collaboration within project teams. Leadership and motivation techniques. Conflict resolution and negotiation skills. Analyzing real-world project scenarios. Participating in group discussions and problem-solving exercises. Simulating project management challenges and decision-making. Looking forward to seeing you on board.

rows.Event Name: Data Analytics Certification Training in Phoenix, AZ
rows.Event Description: The course syllabus is specifically designed to help learners acquire skills for setting achievable goals in the business field. Data analytics is the collection, transformation, and organization of data in order to draw conclusions, make predictions, and drive informed decision-making. Data analysis is a process for obtaining raw data and subsequently converting it into something useful for users’ decision-making. It is a process of inspecting, cleansing, transforming, and modelling data to discover useful information, inform conclusions, and assist decision-making. The Data Analyst certification course will equip you with the latest analytics tools and techniques, how to work with SQL databases and basic SQL queries, the programming languages of R and Python, raw data manipulation, the art of creating data visualizations, and how to apply statistics and predictive analytics in a business environment. To improve your data analysis skills and simplify your decisions, execute these five steps in your data analysis process: An Enterprise Learning Solutions (ELS) provider, Learning Zone Inc. creates industry-fit talents through training, coaching, and consulting by globally acclaimed trainers. Much of Learning Zone’s repute in co-creating business value stems from: Name: Debbie Riel Email: debbie.riel@learninzone.com Phone: +1 302.251.9769

rows.Event Name: Make a Cutting Board
rows.Event Description: Make a cherry cutting board with handle & juice groove! Beginner-friendly. All tools & materials included. In this hands-on woodworking class, you’ll make your own hardwood cutting board complete with a handle cutout and juice groove. Using beautiful domestic cherry wood and a variety of Rockler tools and jigs, you’ll learn fundamental woodworking techniques to create a durable and functional piece that looks great in any kitchen. The finished board will measure approximately ¾" x 12" x 16". What You’ll Do: • Learn to glue up a cutting board blank using Rockler’s Mini Deluxe Panel Clamps • Experience Rockler’s unique “Pay-It-Forward” process — the board you glue will be used in a future class, and you’ll receive a pre-glued board to continue your project • Flatten your cutting board using a drum sander • Square up the board using a table saw • Route a handle cutout using Rockler’s 4-in-1 Cutting Board Handle Routing Template and a compact router • Add a juice groove with Rockler’s Juice Groove Jig • Sand all edges, corners, and surfaces until smooth • Apply a food-safe finish (Odie’s Oil) • Install non-slip rubber feet to complete your board What’s Included: • All materials, domestic cherry hardwood, and supplies • Use of Rockler tools, jigs, and equipment • Rockler safety gear (provided at no additional charge) Important Info: • Class is beginner-friendly — no prior woodworking experience required • All safety gear and materials are included

rows.Event Name: 10 Essential Career-Boosting Skills Workshop in Peoria, AZ
rows.Event Description: Level up your career game with 10 must-have skills in this fun, interactive workshop you won't want to miss! Soft skills are the often-overlooked yet vital abilities that define how we connect, communicate, and collaborate with others. While they may be harder to quantify than technical skills, their impact is unmistakable. Soft skills encompass the confidence you display in challenging situations, the empathy you show when working with diverse teams, and the adaptability you br ing when navigating change. They are the unique qualities that enable you to handle difficult conversations, build lasting relationships, and lead with authenticity. In this 10 Essential Soft Skills workshop, you will explore and develop a strong foundation in key interpersonal and professional skills that can elevate your career and personal growth. Through practical examples and engaging sessions, you'll gain a fresh perspective on how you work and interact with others. By the end of this course, participants will be able to: No prior experience required. Professionals across industries who are eager to enhance their interpersonal and professional capabilities.

rows.Event Name: Phoenix AZ, Everything Eyebrow Certification| 8 Methods | School of Gla
rows.Event Description: Learn 8 AMAZING income earning techniques in this action packed 2 day, hands on, extensive training by a licensed school. 🚀 Master Every Eyebrow Technique & Elevate Your Beauty Career in Just 2 Days! Are you ready to become a top-tier eyebrow specialist and offer high-demand, high-paying services? The Everything Eyebrows Training is an intensive, hands-on 2-day course covering all the top techniques to help you sculpt, shape, and enhance brows with precision. Whether you want to work in a salon, open your own business, or add these skills to your existing services, this class will set you up for success! 🔹 What You’ll Learn: ✔️ Microblading – Create natural, hair-like strokes with precision ✔️ Microshading – Achieve soft, powdery brows for a fuller look ✔️ Threading – A chemical-free method for perfectly shaped brows ✔️ Waxing – Speed up your brow services with precise hair removal ✔️ Tinting – Enhance brows with long-lasting color ✔️ Lamination – Reshape & lift brows for a fuller, fluffy effect ✔️ Brow Extensions – Fill in sparse brows for a natural, bold look ✔️ Eyebrow Design – Learn how to map, shape & customize brows for each client 💰 Earning Potential: After completing this course, you can add an additional $6,000–$10,000+ per month to your business! 🔥 Limited Spots Available – No More Than 6 Students Per Class! 🔥 🎓 Why Choose The School of Glamology? The School of Glamology is a licensed institution with licensed estheticians and licensed instructors, exceeding industry standards. We are committed to providing the highest quality training so you leave fully confident in your skills and ready to grow your beauty business. Unlike other training programs that leave you on your own after class, we provide ongoing mentorship and even offer one FREE refresher course within a year of your initial training! ✔️ Eyebrow Mapping & Face Shape Analysis ✔️ Proper Application & Removal Techniques for Each Service ✔️ Health, Safety, & Sanitation Guidelines ✔️ How to Create Natural & Bold Brow Looks for Different Clients ✔️ Pricing & Business Growth Strategies ✔️ Marketing Your Eyebrow Business for Maximum Success ✅ Complete Professional Brow Kit (Includes all tools & supplies) ✅ Industry-Recognized Certificate from The School of Glamology ✅ Hands-on Training with Licensed Instructors ✅ One Free Refresher Course (Valid for 1 Year!) ✅ Lifetime Post-Class Support 💼 💵 Total Investment: $4,500 💰 Deposit: $500 (Remaining $4,000 due on class day) 📅 Choose Your Own Training Date! Call 619.928.4526 💳 💰 Need Financing? We Got You Covered! 💰 We offer flexible financing options through: ✅ Affirm & Sezzle – Apply here: ✅ Flexxbuy – Apply here: 📞 Questions? Need a private class? Call 619-928-4526 💻 Can’t make it to an in-person class? No problem! Our LIVE, hands-on online training gives you the same high-quality education and hands-on experience—but with the added benefit of one-on-one instruction and flexible scheduling! 💻 How Online Training Works: 1️⃣ Pay in Full – Secure your spot and receive instant access to pre-class materials. 2️⃣ We Ship Your Complete Kit – Everything you need for training is delivered straight to your door. 3️⃣ Schedule Your Live Virtual Training – Once your kit arrives, you’ll book your private online session at a time that works for you! 4️⃣ Face-to-Face Hands-On Learning – Work directly with a licensed instructor in a live, interactive session to master your techniques. 💡 ✔️ 100% Live & Interactive – No Pre-Recorded Videos ✔️ One-on-One Instruction for Personalized Guidance ✔️ Hands-On Training with Real-Time Instructor Feedback ✔️ Includes a Complete Professional Kit ✔️ Industry-Recognized Certification Upon Completion ✔️ Ongoing Support & Mentorship After Training 📩 Ready to Enroll? Click the link below to purchase your online course and start your training today! 🔗 🚀 Get trained from anywhere in the world—on YOUR schedule—without sacrificing quality! 📌 To ensure you are fully prepared for the hands-on training, you will receive a series of instructional videos and course manuals 2-3 days before class. ✅ These materials MUST be reviewed and completed before attending class. ✅ This is essential to ensure you are ready for all the hands-on training. ✅ Failure to complete the pre-class materials may affect your ability to participate in the live training. ⏳ 🔹 Day 1: 10am-5pm 🔹 Day 2: 10am-5pm 🚀 No student will be rushed! We are dedicated to ensuring that every student receives the proper time and attention needed to master each technique. If extra time is required, we will accommodate to ensure you leave confident in your skills. ❗ 🚨 No cosmetology or esthetics license is required to take this class. 📌 However, state regulations vary when it comes to practicing brow services in a salon setting. rows.Event Name: Central Phoenix Screamix Ghost Tour
rows.Event Description: Join us for our spooky adventure through the haunted heart of Central Phoenix! Have you ever wanted to uncover the stories behind some of the most iconic haunted locations in downtown Phoenix — like the legendary Hotel San Carlos or the beautifully eerie Orpheum Theatre? Then this tour is for you. Join us for Central Phoenix Screamix — a haunted history experience where you'll hear chilling tales, learn about Phoenix's fascinating past and paranormal present, and even do some ghost hunting at select outdoor spots using real paranormal tools. Tour Stops Include: 🏨 Hotel San Carlos 🏢 Westward Ho 🏛️ A.E. England Building ⛪ First Baptist Church 🌀 Phoenix Masonic Temple ⚰️ Adams Street Morgue 🎭 Orpheum Theater Why wait until Halloween to get spooky? 🎟️ Tours run every Friday and Saturday at 8 PM 📍Meet by Chase Tower 🔗 Book now at GetGhostedPhoenix.com 🚪NOTE: This is an outdoor-only walking tour—we don’t go inside the buildings, but we do ghost hunt at two haunted locations along the route.

rows.Event Name: Level 1: Thai Massage Essentials
rows.Event Description: Entire class is presented and practiced on a Thai floor mat. A basic introduction to Thai Massage that is suitable for new students. Entire class is presented and practiced on a Thai floor mat. A basic introduction to Thai Massage that is suitable for new students, or practitioners seeking an alternative modality. At the end of the course, the student can perform a complete 60-minute Thai massage routine, including supine, side-lying, prone and seated positions. In Level 1, we begin with the origin of Thai Massage, introduce the theory of Sen lines, and Thai asanas or therapeutic postures. We teach basic principles of western muscular anatomy and place a strong emphasis upon body mechanics and practicing bodywork in a sustainable way. Many western practitioners experience symptoms of occupational disability in hands, shoulders and arms due to reliance upon muscular strength and failure to understand the power of working from the core. We use yoga principles to teach the student how to move in an efficient, elegant and powerful way. With strong fundamentals, Thai bodywork can be not only safe but beneficial for the practitioner and will provide a deeply satisfying career that lasts many decades. $360 12CE Tuition includes workbook and a printed certificate. *Digital certificate copies for replacement are available for $5/each. Saturday and Sunday (June 13th & 14th) from 10-4:30PM. Wear comfortable clothes. There is no disrobing for this class. *There is a service fee for all refunds.

Writing is a key method of communication for most people, and it"s one that many people struggle with. Writing and communication skills have degraded with more and more people communicating through email and text messaging. Developing writing skills is still important in the business world as creating proper documents (such as proposals, reports, and agendas), giving you that extra edge in the workplace. The Business Writing workshop will give your participants a refresher on basic writing concepts (such as spelling, grammar, and punctuation), and an overview of the most common business documents. These basic skills will provide your participants with that extra benefit in the business world that a lot of people are losing. Anybody who is interested in learning Business Writing Skills.
